## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Ravenna (Taylor, Luke) and GrowthX (Marcel) to explore potential collaboration and share company backgrounds.](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ravenna is developing an enterprise service management tool deeply integrated with Slack, targeting internal operations (IT, HR, ops)](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content marketing and SEO services, with a focus on rapid content production and strategic distribution](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Both companies see potential synergies and are interested in further discussions about becoming customers/partners](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

## Topics

### Ravenna Company Background

  - [Founded by Taylor Halliday and Kevin (co-founder) in July 2022](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [YC alumni, raised two rounds of funding (both preempted)](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Product: Enterprise service management tool deeply integrated with Slack](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Target market: Internal operations teams (IT, HR, ops)](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Differentiator: Full service experience within Slack, addressing pain points of traditional tools](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### GrowthX Company Background

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, former CMO at Deepgram](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Offers AI-powered content marketing and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Developed proprietary workflow engine for content production](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor-in-chief and TripAdvisor SEO lead](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Pricing: 10 cents per word, 50-100k words/month](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

### GrowthX Service Model

  - [12-week accelerator program followed by 12-month contract](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Rapid content strategy development and publishing (starting week 2-3)](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Comprehensive service including content creation, SEO, distribution, and conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Dedicated team assigned to each client (managing director, editor, SEO specialist, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Weekly meetings and continuous strategy refinement](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Marcel expressed interest in becoming a Ravenna customer due to their own internal communication challenges](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Taylor and Luke showed interest in GrowthX's services for Ravenna's content marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send meeting recording and set up a Slack channel for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to explore Ravenna's product in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Discuss potential engagement between Ravenna and GrowthX for content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Consider timing for potential collaboration (GrowthX fully booked until April 28th)](https://fathom.video/share/PzBTsU8xofpV9sCU1C8BzPoRz6kf4Dsq?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
